title: Marketing Campaign
task: Create a marketing campaign for a new fitness app targeting working professionals.
hint: Think about target audience, channels, tone, and expected output format.

title: HR Policy Design
task: Design a remote work policy for a growing tech startup.
hint: Think about eligibility, rules, expectations, and document structure.

title: Business Strategy
task: Create a growth strategy for a SaaS company entering a new market.
hint: Think about market analysis, growth goals, constraints, and final format.
